name: Arabic WordNet v2 (Open Multilingual Wordnet v2.0)
attribution: Arabic WordNet via Open Multilingual Wordnet.
notes: SHARE-ALIKE: BY-SA constrains redistribution of derived datasets. redistribute_curated_rows set false pending an explicit product decision. Dense synsets (3.77 senses/synset) but small (9,916 synsets). Import only if gate 9's measurement selects it.
